model_narrative: We plan investment and operations for a national fertilizer industry over a sequence of multi-year periods. In each period and at each plant we decide which production processes to run and at what level, how much capacity to add to each productive unit and whether to expand or convert capacity at all, how much of each final product to ship from each plant to each demand region, how much to import or export, and how much raw material to buy or import. Capacity built in one period stays available in later periods, and expansion or conversion decisions are on-off choices. Each period also carries a set of cost-category totals that roll up into one figure. The objective is to minimize the total discounted cost of the whole plan, summing every cost category over every period after applying each period's discount factor.

description: For every nutrient and every demand region in each period, the nutrient delivered to that region through final products must be enough to meet that region's demand for that nutrient. Count the nutrient carried by each final product, whether it was shipped in from the plants or imported, weighted by how much of that nutrient the product contains, and require the total to be at least the region's demand.

def mbd_rule(model, cq, j, t):
    ppos = {(p, i) for (p, i, t) in model.z}
    cposp = {(c, i) for c in model.c for i in model.i
             if any((p, i) in ppos and float(value(model.a[c, p])) > 0 for p in model.p)}
    def Z(p, i, t):  return model.z[p, i, t]   if (p, i, t)    in model.z  else 0.0
    def XF(c, i, j, t): return model.xf[c, i, j, t] if (c, i, j, t) in model.xf else 0.0
    def XI(c, i, ip, t): return model.xi[c, i, ip, t] if (c, i, ip, t) in model.xi else 0.0
    def VF(c, j, t): return model.vf[c, j, t] if (c, j, t) in model.vf else 0.0
    def VR(c, i, t): return model.vr[c, i, t] if (c, i, t) in model.vr else 0.0
    def E(c, i, t):  return model.e[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.e  else 0.0
    def U(c, i, t):  return model.u[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.u  else 0.0
    def H(m, i, t):  return model.h[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.h  else 0.0
    def UP(g, i, t): return model.up[g, i, t] if (g, i, t)    in model.up else 0.0
    def Y(m, i, t):  return model.y[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.y  else 0.0
    lhs = sum(model.alpha[cf, cq] * (VF(cf, j, t)
              + sum(XF(cf, i, j, t) for i in model.i if (cf, i) in cposp))
              for cf in model.cf)
    return lhs >= model.db[cq, j, t]
model.mbd = Constraint(model.cq, model.j, model.t, rule=mbd_rule)

    cposp = {(c, i) for c in model.c for i in model.i
             if any((p, i) in ppos and float(value(model.a[c, p])) > 0 for p in model.p)}
    def Z(p, i, t):  return model.z[p, i, t]   if (p, i, t)    in model.z  else 0.0
    def XF(c, i, j, t): return model.xf[c, i, j, t] if (c, i, j, t) in model.xf else 0.0
    def XI(c, i, ip, t): return model.xi[c, i, ip, t] if (c, i, ip, t) in model.xi else 0.0
    def VF(c, j, t): return model.vf[c, j, t] if (c, j, t) in model.vf else 0.0
    def VR(c, i, t): return model.vr[c, i, t] if (c, i, t) in model.vr else 0.0
    def E(c, i, t):  return model.e[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.e  else 0.0
    def U(c, i, t):  return model.u[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.u  else 0.0

    def Y(m, i, t):  return model.y[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.y  else 0.0

description: At each plant, for every commodity in every period, the amount available must cover the amount used up. What is produced by the processes running there, plus what arrives by interplant shipment, plus what is bought domestically or imported, must be at least what is consumed by those processes, what is shipped out to other plants, what is sent as final product to demand regions, and what is exported. A process adds to availability for the commodities it yields and draws down availability for the commodities it consumes.

    def Z(p, i, t):  return model.z[p, i, t]   if (p, i, t)    in model.z  else 0.0

    def XI(c, i, ip, t): return model.xi[c, i, ip, t] if (c, i, ip, t) in model.xi else 0.0
    def VF(c, j, t): return model.vf[c, j, t] if (c, j, t) in model.vf else 0.0
    def VR(c, i, t): return model.vr[c, i, t] if (c, i, t) in model.vr else 0.0
    def E(c, i, t):  return model.e[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.e  else 0.0
    def U(c, i, t):  return model.u[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.u  else 0.0
    def H(m, i, t):  return model.h[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.h  else 0.0
    def UP(g, i, t): return model.up[g, i, t] if (g, i, t)    in model.up else 0.0

def ak_rule(model, t):
    def Z(p, i, t):  return model.z[p, i, t]   if (p, i, t)    in model.z  else 0.0
    def XF(c, i, j, t): return model.xf[c, i, j, t] if (c, i, j, t) in model.xf else 0.0
    def XI(c, i, ip, t): return model.xi[c, i, ip, t] if (c, i, ip, t) in model.xi else 0.0
    def VF(c, j, t): return model.vf[c, j, t] if (c, j, t) in model.vf else 0.0
    def VR(c, i, t): return model.vr[c, i, t] if (c, i, t) in model.vr else 0.0
    def E(c, i, t):  return model.e[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.e  else 0.0
    def U(c, i, t):  return model.u[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.u  else 0.0
    def H(m, i, t):  return model.h[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.h  else 0.0
    def UP(g, i, t): return model.up[g, i, t] if (g, i, t)    in model.up else 0.0
    def Y(m, i, t):  return model.y[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.y  else 0.0
    OER = 0.4
    hpos = {(mm, ii) for (mm, ii, tt) in model.h}
    fpos = {(gg, ii) for (gg, ii, tt) in model.up}
    acc = 0.0
    for tp in model.t:
        if float(value(model.ts[t, tp])) >= 1:
            inner = sum(model.omega[me] * Y(me, i, tp) + model.nu[me] * H(me, i, tp)
                        for (me, i) in hpos if me in model.me)
            inner += sum(model.omegag[g] * UP(g, i, tp) for (g, i) in fpos)
            acc += model.sigma * inner
    return model.psic['capital-ch', t] == OER * acc / 1000
model.ak = Constraint(model.t, rule=ak_rule)

model_narrative: We plan investment and operations for a national fertilizer industry over a sequence of multi-year periods. In each period and at each plant we decide which production processes to run and at what level, how much capacity to add to each productive unit and whether to expand or convert capacity at all, how much of each final product to ship from each plant to each demand region, how much to import or export, and how much raw material to buy or import. Capacity built in one period stays available in later periods, and expansion or conversion decisions are on-off choices. Each period also carries a set of cost-category totals that roll up into one figure. The objective is to minimize the total discounted cost of the whole plan, summing every cost category over every period after applying each period's discount factor.

    def XI(c, i, ip, t): return model.xi[c, i, ip, t] if (c, i, ip, t) in model.xi else 0.0
    def VF(c, j, t): return model.vf[c, j, t] if (c, j, t) in model.vf else 0.0
    def VR(c, i, t): return model.vr[c, i, t] if (c, i, t) in model.vr else 0.0

    def H(m, i, t):  return model.h[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.h  else 0.0
    def UP(g, i, t): return model.up[g, i, t] if (g, i, t)    in model.up else 0.0

def al_rule(model, t):
    ppos = {(p, i) for (p, i, t) in model.z}
    cposp = {(c, i) for c in model.c for i in model.i
             if any((p, i) in ppos and float(value(model.a[c, p])) > 0 for p in model.p)}
    def Z(p, i, t):  return model.z[p, i, t]   if (p, i, t)    in model.z  else 0.0
    def XF(c, i, j, t): return model.xf[c, i, j, t] if (c, i, j, t) in model.xf else 0.0
    def XI(c, i, ip, t): return model.xi[c, i, ip, t] if (c, i, ip, t) in model.xi else 0.0
    def VF(c, j, t): return model.vf[c, j, t] if (c, j, t) in model.vf else 0.0
    def VR(c, i, t): return model.vr[c, i, t] if (c, i, t) in model.vr else 0.0
    def E(c, i, t):  return model.e[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.e  else 0.0
    def U(c, i, t):  return model.u[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.u  else 0.0
    def H(m, i, t):  return model.h[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.h  else 0.0
    def UP(g, i, t): return model.up[g, i, t] if (g, i, t)    in model.up else 0.0
    def Y(m, i, t):  return model.y[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.y  else 0.0
    cposi = {(cc, ii, ip) for (cc, ii, ip, tt) in model.xi}
    cposr = {(cc, ii) for (cc, ii, tt) in model.vr}
    cpose = {(cc, ii) for (cc, ii, tt) in model.e}
    tr = 0.0
    for cf in model.cf:
        tr += sum(model.muf[i, j] * XF(cf, i, j, t) for (c, i) in cposp if c == cf for j in model.j)
        tr += sum(model.mufv[j] * VF(cf, j, t) for j in model.j)
        tr += sum(model.mue[i] * E(cf, i, t) for (c, i) in cpose if c == cf)
    tr += sum(model.mui[i, ip] * XI(cs, i, ip, t) for cs in model.cs for (c, i, ip) in cposi if c == cs)
    tr += sum(model.mur[i] * VR(cr, i, t) for cr in model.cr for (c, i) in cposr if c == cr)
    return model.psic['transport', t] == tr / 1000
model.al = Constraint(model.t, rule=al_rule)

description: To build the complete model, enforce the following relationships in order. First, for every nutrient and demand region in each period, the nutrient delivered through final products, whether shipped from the plants or imported, must meet that region's demand. Second, the nitrogen supplied as urea to a region in a period must stay within the allowed share of that region's nitrogen demand. Third, at each plant and for every commodity in each period, what is produced plus what arrives by interplant shipment plus what is bought or imported must cover what is consumed, shipped out, delivered to regions, and exported. Fourth, for every unit at every plant in each period, the load the running processes place on it may not exceed its starting capacity plus all expansion and conversion still in effect from this and earlier periods. Fifth, an expansion's size may not exceed the unit's maximum allowed expansion and may happen only when the expansion decision is switched on. Sixth, each conversion activity at a plant may be undertaken in at most one period over the whole horizon. Seventh, the total exports in a period equal the sum of the individual product exports that period. Eighth, the capital charge in a period equals the recovered cost of all investment in force, combining fixed and capacity-proportional charges for expansion and fixed charges for conversion, scaled by the recovery factor and converted to million le. Ninth, the domestic recurrent cost equals domestic raw-material purchases valued at local prices. Tenth, the operating cost equals miscellaneous process inputs plus the labor cost of expansion. Eleventh, the transport cost equals the cost of all shipments, deliveries, exports, interplant moves, and raw-material imports. Twelfth, the working-capital cost is a fixed small fraction of the domestic recurrent, operating, and imported-raw-material costs. Thirteenth, the imported-raw-material cost equals raw-material imports valued at import prices and converted to million le. Fourteenth, the imported-final-product cost equals final-product imports valued at import prices and converted to million le. Fifteenth, export revenue is recorded as a negative cost equal to final-product exports valued at export prices and converted to million le. Finally, the total discounted cost equals the sum over all periods of the discount factor times the sum of that period's cost categories.

def mbd_rule(model, cq, j, t):
    ppos = {(p, i) for (p, i, t) in model.z}
    cposp = {(c, i) for c in model.c for i in model.i
             if any((p, i) in ppos and float(value(model.a[c, p])) > 0 for p in model.p)}
    def Z(p, i, t):  return model.z[p, i, t]   if (p, i, t)    in model.z  else 0.0
    def XF(c, i, j, t): return model.xf[c, i, j, t] if (c, i, j, t) in model.xf else 0.0
    def XI(c, i, ip, t): return model.xi[c, i, ip, t] if (c, i, ip, t) in model.xi else 0.0
    def VF(c, j, t): return model.vf[c, j, t] if (c, j, t) in model.vf else 0.0
    def VR(c, i, t): return model.vr[c, i, t] if (c, i, t) in model.vr else 0.0
    def E(c, i, t):  return model.e[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.e  else 0.0
    def U(c, i, t):  return model.u[c, i, t]  if (c, i, t)    in model.u  else 0.0
    def H(m, i, t):  return model.h[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.h  else 0.0
    def UP(g, i, t): return model.up[g, i, t] if (g, i, t)    in model.up else 0.0
    def Y(m, i, t):  return model.y[m, i, t]  if (m, i, t)    in model.y  else 0.0
    lhs = sum(model.alpha[cf, cq] * (VF(cf, j, t)
              + sum(XF(cf, i, j, t) for i in model.i if (cf, i) in cposp))

    cpose = {(cc, ii) for (cc, ii, tt) in model.e}
    return model.psic['export', t] == - OER * sum(model.pe[cf] * E(cf, i, t)
           for (cf, i) in cpose if cf in model.cf) / 1000
model.ae = Constraint(model.t, rule=ae_rule)
def obj_rule(model):
    return model.psi == sum(model.delta[t] * sum(model.psic[q, t] for q in model.q)
           for t in model.t)
model.objdef = Constraint(rule=obj_rule)
